name: relatorios-pix-filmes
description: Sistema de Relatórios de Vídeos - Pix Filmes

scripts.start:backend: cd backend && DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=3307 DB_NAME=relatorios DB_USER=relatorios DB_PASSWORD=relatorios123 JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production-min-32-chars NODE_ENV=development npm run dev
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install

author: Victor Samuel
